Run: Update-MgPolicyIdentitySecurityDefaultsEnforcementPolicy -IsEnabled $true. Entra admin center > Properties > Manage security defaults.
Run: Get-MgDirectoryRole -Filter "displayName eq 'Global Administrator'" | Get-MgDirectoryRoleMember. Maintain 2-4 global admins using dedicated accounts.
Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{PermissionGrantPoliciesAssigned = @()}. Entra admin center > Enterprise applications > Consent and permissions.
Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateApps = $false}. Entra admin center > Users > User settings.
Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateSecurityGroups = $false}. Entra admin center > Groups > General.
Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateTenants = $false}. Entra admin center > Users > User settings.
Run: Update-MgPolicyAdminConsentRequestPolicy -IsEnabled $true. Entra admin center > Enterprise applications > Admin consent requests.
Run: Update-MgBetaPolicyAuthenticationMethodPolicy with RegistrationEnforcement settings. Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Registration campaign.
Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > SMS > Disable. SMS is vulnerable to SIM-swapping attacks.
Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Voice call > Disable. Voice is vulnerable to telephony-based attacks.
Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Email OTP > Disable. Email OTP is a weaker authentication factor.

Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Maximum number of devices per user. Set to 15 or lower.
